6. Get IPS policies in a domain
Returns the IPS policies in a domain.
Base Command
nsm-get-ips-policies
Input
Argument Name
Description
name: nsm-get-ips-policies

outputs.description: IPS policy ID NSM.IPSPolicies.Name IPS policy name
outputs.name: NSM.IPSPolicies.ID

outputs.description: IPS policy domain ID NSM.IPSPolicies.IsEditable Whether you can edit the IPS policy
outputs.name: NSM.IPSPolicies.DomainID

outputs.description: Whether the IPS Policy is visible to domain's children
outputs.name: NSM.IPSPolicies.VisibleToChildren
